headline: Strategic angle — Close BRSR/TCFD gaps to regain ESG index eligibility and lower cost of capital by 20-40 bps
what_matters: Adani Power faces a moderate ESG score gap versus peers like JSW Energy, with risk of index exclusion if BRSR/TCFD disclosures lag.
No direct impact on talent or community; consumer demand is the root cause, but not an ESG-driven social issue.
BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, GRI triggered; SEBI scrutiny possible if non-disclosure persists, with risk of trading restrictions.
action: Strategic opportunity: Close BRSR/TCFD gaps to regain ESG index eligibility and lower cost of capital by 20-40 bps
Competitive position: JSW Energy better positioned due to stronger ESG disclosure; Adani Power at risk of lagging sector peers
